description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] 和风天气 (QWeather) API — city lookup, real-time weather, and 7-day forecast. As of 2024+ QWeather issues a per-account API Host; set yours below. The API key is sent as the 'key' query param.

credentialFields.name: apiHost
credentialFields.label: API Host
credentialFields.description: Your account-specific API Host, found in the QWeather Console under Settings (Project / API Host). Enter the host only, without https:// or a trailing slash. The legacy shared hosts (devapi.qweather.com / geoapi.qweather.com) are deprecated and being retired from 2026.

credentialFields.name: apiKey
credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.description: Create a project + key in the QWeather Console (https://console.qweather.com). Sent as the 'key' query param. (QWeather plans to rate-limit API-KEY auth from 2027 in favor of JWT.)

tools.name: qweather_city_lookup
tools.description: Look up a city / location to get its LocationID, name, and coordinates (城市搜索).

params.name: location
params.description: City name (e.g. 北京 or beijing), a LocationID, or coordinates 'lng,lat'.

tools.name: qweather_now
tools.description: Get real-time weather for a location (实时天气).

tools.name: qweather_forecast_7d
tools.description: Get the 7-day weather forecast for a location (7天预报).
